zh.lifeSummary: 當John Webber於大約1683年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克時，他的父親Samuel Webber28歲，母親Deborah Littlefield21歲。他於1709年3月1日與Magdalene Hilton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1740年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Webber于大约1683年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克时，他的父亲Samuel Webber28岁，母亲Deborah Littlefield21岁。他于1709年3月1日与Magdalene Hilton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1740年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克威爾斯享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Webber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webber, an agent derivative of Webb .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weber   ‘weaver’.

variants.name: Webb
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Webber was born about 1683, in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Samuel Webber, was 28 and his mother, Deborah Littlefield, was 21. He married Magdalene Hilton on 1 March 1709, in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1740, in Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Webber est né environ 1683, à York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Samuel Webber, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Deborah Littlefield, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Magdalene Hilton le 1 mars 1709, à Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1740, à Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 59 ans.

Lui sposato Magdalene Hilton il 1 marzo 1709, nel Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John Webberが約1683年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークで生まれた時，父Samuel Webberは28歳，母Deborah Littlefieldは21歳であった。1709年3月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークウエルズでMagdalene Hiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1740年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークウエルズで59歳で死去した。

ko.Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스

ko.lifeSummary: John Webber(이)가 대략 1683년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Webber(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Deborah Littlefield(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1709년 3월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스에서 Magdalene Hilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1740년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 웰스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Webber nasceu aproximadamente 1683, em York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Samuel Webber, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Deborah Littlefield, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Magdalene Hilton em 1 de março de 1709, em Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1740, em Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Webber родился около 1683 г. в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Samuel Webber было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Deborah Littlefield, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Magdalene Hilton 1 марта 1709 г. в местности веллс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1740 г. в местности веллс, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Webber nació aproximadamente 1683, en York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Samuel Webber, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Deborah Littlefield, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Magdalene Hilton el 1 de marzo de 1709, en Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1740, en Wells, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 59 años.
